title: rubus × valdefoliatus
intro: Rubus × valdefoliatus, also known as the hybrid raspberry or Himalayan raspberry, is a plant species that belongs to the Rosaceae family and is a cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus. The medicinal properties of Rubus × valdefoliatus include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to aid in reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × valdefoliatus include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and support digestive health, among others. Rubus × valdefoliatus can be prepared as herbal tea, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and easily accessible herbal remedy.
